title: T-117 — Schema: settings flag `require_grn_qc_inspection` (placeholder for 09-QUALITY)
prompt:
# T-117 — Schema: settings flag `require_grn_qc_inspection` (placeholder for 09-QUALITY)

## Goal
Add require_grn_qc_inspection flag in settings + typed accessor (placeholder for 09-QUALITY).

PO decision 2026-05-03: T-117/T-118 quality flag placeholders remain in Settings. Verify canonical flags storage before deciding on column-add vs seeded row. Accessor wraps withOrgContext. Document placeholder contract.

## Files in scope
- src/db/schema/settings/flags.ts [edit or create]
- src/db/migrations/0117_settings_require_grn_qc_inspection.sql [create via drizzle-kit]
- packages/domain/src/settings/grn-qc.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/settings/__tests__/grn-qc.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the migration is applied, when the flag is queried for an unconfigured tenant, then it defaults to false.
- Given a tenant sets the flag to true, when getRequireGrnQcInspection runs, then it returns true.
- Given `pnpm vitest run packages/domain/src/settings/__tests__/grn-qc.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
- Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then 0 errors.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED schema-shape test asserting flag presence + default false.
- RED accessor test for default and override paths.
- Run `pnpm vitest run` for new test file.

## Risk red lines
- Do not enforce the flag in any GRN-side code path — that is 09-QUALITY scope.
- Do not bypass withOrgContext.
- Do not break existing settings migrations.
